shortDescription.text: Standard browser automation framework for web testing and QA

fullDescription.text: Identifies legitimate browser automation tools that provide CLI interfaces for web interaction, DOM manipulation, form filling, and screenshot capture. These tools are commonly used in authorized testing, QA automation, and web scraping workflows.

message.text: VERIFICATION RESULT: REFUTED - Threat Intel explicitly refutes malicious classification. The 'agent-browser' skill is a legitimate browser automation tool documentation. Threat Intelligence Analysis: (1) Academic paper (2602.06547v2.pdf) confirms agent skills are standard LLM extensions with responsible disclosure framework; (2) Synk Skill Report documents known malicious actor campaigns (zaycv, Aslaep123, pepe276, aztr0nutzs) but agent-browser is NOT listed in any malicious campaign; (3) Malicious skills show clear intent (typosquatting, crypto targeting, jailbreaks) - agent-browser shows none of these patterns. INTENT ASSESSMENT: No confirmed malicious intent. All documented behaviors are standard browser automation operations: navigation, DOM interaction, form filling, screenshot capture, session management. No obfuscation, no exploit primitives, no credential exfiltration, no C2 communication, no persistence mechanisms. CONCLUSION: Legitimate tool for authorized web testing and QA automation.

snippet.text: agent-browser: Browser automation tool for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction

threat_intel_sources: Synk Skill Report (Malware campaign analysis - agent-browser NOT listed)
properties.false_positive_assessment: HIGH CONFIDENCE - This is a legitimate browser automation tool, not malware

properties.verification_methodology: Threat Intelligence Reconciliation + Intent Validation + False Positive Guardrail
properties.threat_intel_reconciliation: Threat Intel REFUTES malicious classification. Known malware campaigns documented in Synk report do NOT include agent-browser. Malicious skills show distinct patterns (typosquatting, crypto targeting, jailbreaks) absent from agent-browser.
properties.false_positive_rationale: All three conditions met: (1) No exploit primitives (RCE, injection, privilege escalation); (2) No confirmed malicious infrastructure; (3) Behavior matches common developer/security tools (Playwright, Puppeteer, Selenium patterns)
properties.recommendation: NO ACTION REQUIRED - This is a legitimate tool. Safe for use in authorized web testing and QA automation workflows.
